title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Wano Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Momonosuke, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The talk of the capital is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's been another sighting!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: that ghost appeared again--)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "I'll Haunt Youuu' UUU

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here's an update on the disturbance at the Northern Cemetery!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As you all probably know, the culprit is none other than KAMAZOU THE MANSZAYERW! Even though he is known through out the country. He has yet to be apprehended!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore... appearing late into the night... the watching hour boy has returned!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He steals money from the rich...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And shares it with the poor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is this boy?! Is he an ally of justice, or is he evil?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Kyaah~ Mr. Witching hour--o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'll take a copy.:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here you go. Please come again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right, now!! Come on over and check it out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Today's issue is full of big scoops!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The waning Crescent Moon...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Who gave this to me....!?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Has the Kozuki family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Truly returned....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey... is this really the work of ghosts?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What will come from questioning it? This is the SPARK we've been waiting for!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm going!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this had happened a decade ago.. I would be going, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... in any case, how will you two get weapons?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only Samuel are allowed to carry swords in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and orochi has even gone as far as forbidding the use of weapons...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's removed the power- source of any possible rebellion!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if I have to fight bare- handed!! This is our last chance!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is what I've been waiting for!! Uwooooooh!! I'm trembling in excite- went!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you've got time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Come and have a look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sit down, relax, and listen closely--!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
